name: ghostroute
description: GhostRoute — privacy-first personal reference-route navigation: record trips, save your most efficient run, and passively compare later drives against it

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/scoring --workspace packages/comparison && npm run build --workspace apps/backend --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace packages/scoring --workspace packages/comparison && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
